by seasoned developers. Development of Ptolemy Classic is winding down at UC Berkeley, the 0.7.2devel release has not undergone strenuous testing. At this time, we are not planning on doing further Ptolemy Classic releases, most of our effort is goi

tolemy Classic releases, most of our effort is going into Ptolemy II . Ptolemy II 0.7.2devel is available either as a tar file or via CVS Tar files http://ptolemy.eecs.berkeley.edu/~cxh/ptdevel user: ptdevel password: ptrules Subversion In Decembe

ptdevel password: ptrules Subversion In December, 2013, we moved from CVS to Subversion: svn co https://repo.eecs.berkeley.edu/svn-anon/projects/chess/ptclassic/trunk/ptclassic Note that Ptolemy 0.7.2devel may be built under Windows XP, though the

7.2devel may be built under Windows XP, though the build is non-trivial. For details see $PTOLEMY/doc/html/nt or http://ptolemy.eecs.berkeley.edu/~cxh/ptpub/nt/index.html . Contact Update Help Copyright © 1999 - UC Regents; all rights reserved.
